title: Bearden Phase Conjugate PASS: QCI opposite-sign as pumped phase conjugation
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the structural parallel between Bearden's pumped phase conjugate mirror model and the empirical QCI opposite-sign pattern. Global stress (pump) creates coherence at manifold level while producing scattered conjugate response at trajectory level.

bearden_model.source: Bearden scalar EM / pumped phase conjugate mirror theory
bearden_model.core_claim: stress is a pumper — stress acts as a pump beam creating phase conjugation
bearden_model.pump_beam: global stress tightens coupling (order at manifold level)
bearden_model.conjugate_response: local trajectories scatter (disorder at trajectory level)
bearden_model.phase_conjugation_signature: discrepancy between pump and conjugate = the signal

qa_mapping.pump_beam_qa: QCI_global rises during stress (positive correlation with future vol)
qa_mapping.conjugate_response_qa: QCI_local drops during stress (negative correlation with future vol)
qa_mapping.phase_conjugation_qa: QCI_gap = QCI_local - QCI_global = the phase conjugation signature

svp_connection.keely_triune_link: stress = departure from DOMINANT/singularity toward ENHARMONIC/satellite
